prophecies.q: 小征兆：知识消逝与无知蔓延
prophecies.a: 「末日的征兆之一是：知识将被夺去，无知将蔓延。」——布哈里圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Minor Sign: Loss of Knowledge and Spread of Ignorance
prophecies.a_en: "Among the signs of the Hour: knowledge will be taken away, and ignorance will prevail." — Sahih al-Bukhari
prophecies.verdict_zh: 圣训中的「知识」特指宗教知识（ilm）。现代社会中，世俗教育空前普及，但宗教知识在许多穆斯林社区确实出现了传承中断。伊斯兰学者普遍认为此征兆正在逐步应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'knowledge' in the Hadith refers specifically to religious knowledge (ilm). While secular education has never been more widespread, religious knowledge has indeed declined in many Muslim communities. Islamic scholars generally consider this sign to be gradually manifesting.

prophecies.a: 「末日的征兆之一是：饮酒将变得普遍，人们将认为它是合法的。」——布哈里圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Minor Sign: Prevalence of Alcohol Consumption
prophecies.a_en: "Among the signs of the Hour: drinking of alcohol will be widespread, and people will consider it lawful." — Sahih al-Bukhari
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球酒精消费量在20世纪持续增长。世界卫生组织数据显示，2019年全球15岁以上人口人均纯酒精消费量约6.2升。即使在穆斯林占多数的国家，饮酒现象也有不同程度的存在。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global alcohol consumption grew steadily through the 20th century. WHO data shows per capita pure alcohol consumption was about 6.2 liters for people aged 15+ in 2019. Even in Muslim-majority countries, alcohol consumption exists to varying degrees.

prophecies.a: 「你将看到赤脚的、赤身的、贫穷的牧羊人在建筑高楼方面相互竞争。」——穆斯林圣训集（吉卜利勒圣训）
prophecies.q_en: Minor Sign: Competition in Building Tall Structures
prophecies.a_en: "You will see barefoot, naked, destitute shepherds competing in constructing tall buildings." — Sahih Muslim (Hadith of Gabriel)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 阿拉伯半岛的贝都因游牧民族后裔建造了世界上最高的建筑群。迪拜哈利法塔（828米，2010年建成）是世界第一高楼，沙特阿拉伯的吉达塔规划高度超过1000米。海湾国家的摩天楼竞赛是这条圣训最常被引用的现实对应。
prophecies.verdict_en: Descendants of Bedouin nomads on the Arabian Peninsula have built the world's tallest structures. The Burj Khalifa in Dubai (828m, completed 2010) is the world's tallest building, and Saudi Arabia's Jeddah Tower is planned to exceed 1,000m. The Gulf states' skyscraper race is the most commonly cited real-world fulfillment of this Hadith.

prophecies.a: 「末日不会来临，直到时间收缩——一年如同一月，一月如同一周，一周如同一天，一天如同一小时，一小时如同点燃一根绳子的时间。」——提尔密济圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "The Hour will not come until time contracts — a year will be like a month, a month like a week, a week like a day, a day like an hour, and an hour like the burning of a palm leaf." — Jami' al-Tirmidhi
prophecies.verdict_zh: 伊斯兰学者对此有两种解读：一是物理时间加速（末日临近的超自然现象），二是主观时间感知加快。现代生活节奏的加速、信息过载带来的时间压缩感，被许多人视为此征兆的体现。但也有学者认为这描述的是尚未发生的超自然事件。
prophecies.verdict_en: Islamic scholars offer two interpretations: literal acceleration of physical time (a supernatural phenomenon near the end) or subjective perception of time speeding up. The accelerated pace of modern life and information overload creating a sense of time compression are seen by many as fulfillment. However, some scholars argue this describes a supernatural event yet to occur.

prophecies.a: 「末日不会来临，直到杀戮增多。」先知被问及何谓杀戮增多，他说：「杀人之事将频繁发生，以至于杀人者不知为何而杀，被杀者不知为何而死。」——穆斯林圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "The Hour will not come until killing increases." The Prophet was asked about the increase in killing, and he said: "It will be so prevalent that the killer will not know why he killed, and the victim will not know why he was killed." — Sahih Muslim
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20-21世纪经历了前所未有的战争与屠杀规模（两次世界大战、种族灭绝事件等）。现代恐怖袭击和大规模枪击事件中，受害者往往确实「不知为何而死」。但从人均暴力死亡率看，史蒂芬·平克等学者认为人类社会总体上变得更安全了。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 20th-21st centuries saw unprecedented scale of warfare and massacre (two World Wars, genocides). In modern terrorist attacks and mass shootings, victims often indeed 'do not know why they were killed.' However, in terms of per capita violent death rates, scholars like Steven Pinker argue human society has overall become safer.

prophecies.q: 小征兆：信托背叛与不义者当权
prophecies.a: 「当信托被辜负时，你就等待末日吧。」有人问：「信托如何被辜负？」先知说：「当事务被交给不胜任的人时，你就等待末日吧。」——布哈里圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Minor Sign: Betrayal of Trust and Unqualified Leadership
prophecies.a_en: "When trust is lost, then wait for the Hour." Someone asked: "How will trust be lost?" The Prophet said: "When authority is given to those who do not deserve it, then wait for the Hour." — Sahih al-Bukhari
prophecies.verdict_zh: 这一预言被广泛认为在现代政治中有所体现：民粹主义兴起、政治任命的专业性下降等现象。但「不胜任」的标准带有主观性，且历史上任人唯亲的政治现象古已有之，并非现代独有。
prophecies.verdict_en: This prophecy is widely seen as manifesting in modern politics: the rise of populism, declining professionalism in political appointments, etc. However, the standard of 'undeserving' is subjective, and nepotistic governance has existed throughout history, not unique to modern times.

prophecies.q: 小征兆：远方消息的传递
prophecies.a: 「末日的征兆之一是：一个人的鞭子或鞋子的带子会告诉他，他不在时家人做了什么。」——提尔密济圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "Among the signs of the Hour: a man's whip or the strap of his shoe will tell him what his family has been doing in his absence." — Jami' al-Tirmidhi
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代智能手机（随身携带的手持设备）使人们可以随时与远方家人通话、视频通话、查看家庭监控等。智能手表和可穿戴设备更接近于「鞭子或鞋带」的隐喻——随身佩戴的小物件传递远方信息。
prophecies.verdict_en: Modern smartphones (handheld devices carried everywhere) allow people to call, video chat with, and monitor family from afar. Smartwatches and wearable devices even more closely match the metaphor of 'whip or shoe strap' — small personal items conveying information from a distance.

prophecies.a: 「末日之前必有一个时期，人们不再关心所获钱财是合法还是非法的。」——布哈里圣训集。又：「一个时代将来临，届时人人都会吃利息，即使不直接吃的人也会沾染它的尘埃。」——艾布·达吾德圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "There will come a time when people will not care whether what they earn is lawful or unlawful." — Sahih al-Bukhari. Also: "A time will come when everyone will consume riba (usury/interest), and even those who do not consume it will be touched by its dust." — Sunan Abu Dawud
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代全球金融体系建立在利率机制之上，几乎所有人都通过银行存款、贷款、信用卡等方式直接或间接参与了利息交易。即使是不主动借贷的人，其储蓄和消费也不可避免地受到利率的影响。伊斯兰金融虽发展迅速，但规模仅占全球金融体系的很小比例。
prophecies.verdict_en: The modern global financial system is built on interest rate mechanisms. Nearly everyone participates in interest transactions directly or indirectly through bank deposits, loans, and credit cards. Even those who do not actively borrow are unavoidably affected by interest rates. While Islamic finance is growing rapidly, it remains a tiny fraction of the global financial system.

prophecies.q: 小征兆：与罗马人（西方）的大战
prophecies.a: 「你们将与罗马人作战，你们之前的人也将与他们作战……你们将在八万人一面旗帜下与他们交战。」——穆斯林圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Minor Sign: Great Battle with the Romans (the West)
prophecies.a_en: "You will fight the Romans, and those before you will also fight them... You will fight them under eighty banners, each banner with twelve thousand soldiers." — Sahih Muslim

prophecies.a: 「即使世界只剩下一天，安拉也会延长那一天，直到他派出一个人，出自我的后裔，与我同名，其父与我父同名。他将以公正和正义充满大地，正如大地此前被不义和压迫所充满。」——艾布·达吾德圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Major Sign: Coming of the Mahdi
prophecies.a_en: "Even if only one day remains of the world, Allah will lengthen that day until He sends a man from my descendants, whose name matches mine and whose father's name matches my father's name. He will fill the earth with justice and equity, just as it had been filled with injustice and oppression." — Sunan Abu Dawud

prophecies.q: 大征兆：达贾勒（伪基督）的出现
prophecies.a: 「从阿丹被造到末日来临之间，没有比达贾勒更大的灾祸。他是一个独眼的人，眼睛像一颗突出的葡萄。他将在大地上游走四十天——其中一天如同一年，一天如同一月，一天如同一周，其余的日子如同你们的日子。」——穆斯林圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Major Sign: Appearance of the Dajjal (Antichrist)
prophecies.a_en: "There is no tribulation from the creation of Adam to the Hour greater than the Dajjal. He is a one-eyed man whose eye looks like a protruding grape. He will roam the earth for forty days — one day like a year, one day like a month, one day like a week, and the rest of his days like your days." — Sahih Muslim

prophecies.q: 大征兆：尔萨（耶稣）的降临
prophecies.a: 「以掌握我灵魂的主宰起誓，麦尔彦之子（尔萨）即将降临你们中间，作为一位公正的裁判者。他将打碎十字架，杀死猪，废除吉兹亚税，财富将多到无人愿意接受。」——布哈里圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, the son of Maryam (Isa/Jesus) will shortly descend among you as a just judge. He will break the cross, kill the swine, abolish the jizyah tax, and wealth will be so abundant that no one will accept it." — Sahih al-Bukhari

prophecies.q: 大征兆：雅朱者与马朱者（歌革与玛各）的释放
prophecies.a: 「雅朱者与马朱者将被释放，他们将从每一个高地倾泻而下。」——古兰经 21:96。又：「他们经过太巴列耶湖（加利利海），喝尽湖水。后来的人经过时会说：'这里曾经有水。'」——穆斯林圣训集
prophecies.q_en: Major Sign: Release of Ya'juj and Ma'juj (Gog and Magog)
prophecies.a_en: "Ya'juj and Ma'juj will be released, and they will swoop down from every elevation." — Quran 21:96. Also: "They will pass by the Lake of Tiberias (Sea of Galilee) and drink all its water. The last of them will pass by and say: 'There was once water here.'" — Sahih Muslim

prophecies.q: 大征兆：太阳从西方升起
prophecies.a: 「末日不会来临，直到太阳从西方升起。当太阳从西方升起时，所有人都将信仰，但那时信仰将不再被接受。」——布哈里圣训集。古兰经亦载：「你的主的某些征兆来临之日，信仰将不再有益于从前未曾信仰的人。」——古兰经 6:158
prophecies.q_en: Major Sign: The Sun Rising from the West
prophecies.a_en: "The Hour will not come until the sun rises from the West. When it rises from the West, all people will believe, but at that point faith will no longer be accepted." — Sahih al-Bukhari. The Quran also states: "The day some signs of your Lord come, faith shall not benefit a soul that had not believed before." — Quran 6:158

prophecies.a: 「当那判决降临于他们的时候，我将使一种地兽从地面出来对他们说话，因为人们不相信我的启示。」——古兰经 27:82。圣训记载地兽将用穆萨（摩西）之杖标记信士的面庞使之光亮，用苏莱曼（所罗门）之戒标记不信者的面庞使之黯淡。
prophecies.q_en: Major Sign: The Beast of the Earth (Dabbat al-Ard)
prophecies.a_en: "When the Word is fulfilled against them, We will bring forth a beast from the earth to speak to them, because people did not believe in Our signs." — Quran 27:82. Hadith narrations state the Beast will mark believers' faces with the staff of Musa (Moses) making them bright, and mark disbelievers' faces with the ring of Sulayman (Solomon) making them dark.

prophecies.a: 「末日之前将有三次大地陷落：一次在东方，一次在西方，一次在阿拉伯半岛。」——穆斯林圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "Before the Hour there will be three great landslides (khusuf): one in the East, one in the West, and one in the Arabian Peninsula." — Sahih Muslim

prophecies.a: 「末日不会来临，直到也门升起一场大火，照亮或驱赶叙利亚布斯拉的骆驼脖子。」——布哈里圣训集。又：「一场火将从也门的亚丁海底升起，驱赶人们走向集合之地。」——穆斯林圣训集
prophecies.a_en: "The Hour will not come until a fire emerges from Yemen, illuminating or driving the camels' necks in Busra, Syria." — Sahih al-Bukhari. Also: "A fire will emerge from the bottom of the sea of Aden in Yemen, driving people toward the gathering place." — Sahih Muslim

prophecies.q: 末日：号角的吹响与审判日
prophecies.a: 「号角将被吹响，天地间凡安拉意欲的一切都将死亡。然后号角再次吹响，他们将站起来注视着。」——古兰经 39:68。「那一天，人们将如飞散的蝶群，群山将如被弹松的彩色羊毛。」——古兰经 101:4-5
prophecies.q_en: The End: The Trumpet and Day of Judgment
prophecies.a_en: "The Trumpet will be blown, and all who are in the heavens and the earth will fall dead except whom Allah wills. Then it will be blown again, and they will stand, looking on." — Quran 39:68. "On that Day, people will be like scattered moths, and the mountains will be like carded wool." — Quran 101:4-5
